steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
At the intersection point, both expressions equal $y$. Setting them equal:
$$76 = x^2 - 5$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add 5 to both sides: $$81 = x^2$$ Take the square root: $$x = \pm 9$$ This gives $x = 9$ or $x = -9$. Since $x = -9$ appears in the choices, that matches choice B — B is correct.
